## LibraryRuntime.IIngredient.isSugar() method

Returns true if this is a sugar ingredient. When true, sugar-specific properties are available.

**Signature:**

```typescript
isSugar(): this is ISugarIngredient;
```
**Returns:**

this is [ISugarIngredient](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.isugaringredient.md)
